findings.message: Policy resource descriptors could diverge from executable/input fields used by providers.
findings.disposition: PolicyEngine now rejects fs/process/network/browser/MCP resource/input mismatch; subagent broker requests use the same Pi argv builder as the subprocess backend; smoke test 15 covers process, network and fs.read mismatch.

findings.message: Fetch followed redirects by default, creating SSRF risk.
findings.disposition: WebFetchProvider uses redirect:'manual' and blocks every 3xx response before reading the body.
parseGovernedUrl rejects URL credentials with a generic error; smoke test 15 covers credential URL denial.

findings.message: Private-host checks missed IPv6 private/link-local and IPv4-mapped IPv6 literals.
findings.disposition: Policy and web DNS guards now deny localhost, metadata, RFC1918 IPv4, IPv4-mapped IPv6, unique-local and link-local IPv6; smoke test 15 covers IPv4-mapped loopback.

findings.message: Fetch did not resolve and reject private DNS answers before network access.
findings.disposition: WebFetchProvider resolves all addresses before fetch and rejects private/metadata answers; residual DNS TOCTOU risk remains because global fetch resolves separately.

findings.message: Web fetch had no timeout guard.
findings.disposition: WebFetchProvider combines caller signal with AbortSignal.timeout(default 30000ms); timeoutMs is schema-validated.

findings.message: No-backend providers could return decision.result=allow with ok=false.
findings.disposition: Browser, MCP and vision providers return explicit provider.*.unavailable denials before broker invocation when no backend/delegate is configured; smoke test 15 covers vision.

findings.message: A local symlink swap between containment check and filesystem I/O remains theoretically possible.
findings.disposition: Existing checks resolve containment before broker approval and provider I/O; full mitigation requires fd-level no-follow/openat semantics and is tracked as residual risk for a later sandboxed filesystem adapter.
